.file-embed.background: rgb(206, 205, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(196, 195, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(216, 214, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(216, 214, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(216, 214, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(94, 141, 135, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(59, 49, 105, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(63, 127, 49, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(94, 141, 135, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(226, 224, 226, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(98, 147, 142, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(216, 214, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(98, 147, 142, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(196, 195, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(196, 195, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(98, 147, 142, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(216, 214, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(196, 195, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(216, 214, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(206, 205, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(152, 119, 59, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(206, 205, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(206, 205, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
